name: Quit job after ladder fall, still get comp in West Valley City?
description: Yes, comp independent of employment status.

mainEntity.name: Quit job after ladder fall, still get comp in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, comp independent of employment status.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, benefits continue regardless of quitting, if injury-related.**

UT law doesn't penalize leaving; prove disability.

- TTD until max medical.
- Job search not always required.
- Retaliation if forced out.

Document quit reasons.
